text.message: If I was red I would 100% gone 9,5,10 & 9,4,11
As if black gets that spot
Black is favorite here , 6 ore best block
Why trade that with black over me?
I’m just holding but trying to save for a city
I would have given you a brick there…
Think we need to work together
What’s the block? 9 sheep or the 6 ore
I’d need a bunch of brick
